targetRules.perspective: top-down 3/4 with readable front and top planes
targetRules.lighting: soft upper-left light with short contact shadow
targetRules.outline: soft navy or warm charcoal; avoid pure-black heavy contours
targetRules.rendering: crisp pixel clusters with medium detail; no smooth HD vector edges
targetRules.grid: 16px world tile; bottom-center anchor; placement on 16px grid by default

entries.label: Player hero
entries.reason: Strong readable silhouette, controlled navy palette, and suitable character-detail target.

entries.label: Checkout counter
entries.reason: Clean warm-ivory material, restrained outline, and readable modular construction.

entries.label: Long digital kiosk
entries.reason: Good navy, gold, ivory, and cyan balance with crisp screen detail.

entries.label: Animated planter
entries.reason: Strong outline, grounded base, and detail level compatible with major storefront assets.

entries.label: Restroom entrance
entries.reason: Clear warm architectural surfaces and lighting suitable as the wall-facility reference.

entries.label: Digital ad column
entries.reason: Matches the desired navy/cyan terminal technology family.

entries.label: Beauty display base
entries.reason: Most-used retail prop and a stable reference for warm ivory fixtures.

entries.label: Waiting seats
entries.reason: Upgraded to the native v3 master with consistent navy upholstery, silver structure and source density.

entries.label: Luggage carts
entries.reason: Useful directional shape, but low contrast and thin detail disappear beside richer props.

entries.label: Cleaning trolley
entries.reason: Upgraded to the native v2 master and accepted in the facilities grouping at its intended display size.

entries.label: Moving walkway
entries.reason: Upgraded to the v2 frame master with a locked footprint, stable baseline and canonical cyan/navy materials.

entries.label: Legacy service counter
entries.reason: Color family is close, but legacy directional variants use inconsistent dimensions and density.

entries.label: Legacy sign pillar
entries.reason: Palette matches, but the side view is too visually empty and thin at game scale.

entries.label: Floor wayfinding
entries.reason: Useful readable sign, but smooth text rendering conflicts with the pixel-cluster treatment.

entries.label: Charging station
entries.reason: Replaced by the v3 source-density master with the canonical navy, ivory, cyan and gold material treatment.

entries.label: Emergency cabinet
entries.reason: Replaced by the v3 cabinet with consistent source density, ivory housing, navy outline and controlled safety red.

entries.label: Recycling station
entries.reason: Replaced by the v3 three-bin unit with a readable top plane, shared ivory shell and controlled category accents.

entries.label: Queue barriers
entries.reason: Replaced by the v3 barrier group with clean silver posts, navy belts, gold accents and no purple fringe.
